description: Machine-readable source of truth for the Glenmoor primary combat VFX batch workflow.

promptBlocks.globalPositive: isolated painterly tactical RPG visual effect, transparent background, centered composition, readable silhouette, controlled particles, production-ready game effect plate, no text, no UI
promptBlocks.globalNegative: background scene, character body, unreadable particle fog, photoreal explosion, text, watermark, border, logo, off-center composition
promptBlocks.sheetDirective: final combat effect sheet on an exact 256 by 256 transparent canvas, centered burst, readable at gameplay scale

primarySheets.descriptor: steel-toned impact flash with sharp center, restrained sparks, and crisp outer silhouette
radiant cast burst with controlled magical bloom, layered halo, and clean readable edge
ward pulse ring with looping aura, soft inner glow, and stable circular readability
wind-toned projectile burst with streaking motion, centered impact core, and clean directional flare
